leadText: The Dynamax Candy (Japanese: ダイマックスアメ Daimax Candy) is a type of Candy introduced in Generation VIII. It increases the Dynamax Level of a Pokémon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, a Dynamax Candy increases its Dynamax Level by one. It can be used on a Pokémon until its maximum Dynamax Level of 10 is reached. Each Dynamax Level increases the HP of a Dynamax Pokémon by 5% of its maximum base HP.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed. S V A candy that is packed with energy. If consumed, it raises the Dynamax Level of a Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Dynamax Candy cannot be used on Zacian , Zamazenta , and Eternatus due to their inability to Dynamax. However, it can be used on Shedinja , despite not having any effect since its HP does not increase when it Dynamaxes.
